label: CIS Safeguard 13.8
title: Deploy a Network Intrusion Prevention Solution

prose.en: Deploy a network intrusion prevention solution, where appropriate. Example implementations include the use of a Network Intrusion Prevention System (NIPS) or equivalent CSP service.
A network intrusion prevention solution is deployed, where appropriate.

example.en: Example implementations include the use of a Network Intrusion Prevention System (NIPS) or equivalent CSP service.
